summary: Agent New Sale Page Testing - Iteration 15 Complete. Complete rebuild of 'Nouvelle Vente' page verified. All features work: stable lottery display (220 lotteries), Haiti timezone (UTC-5), lottery status badges, ticket creation with validation, success modal with QR code. 19 backend API tests + 37 frontend E2E tests all passed.
seed_data_creation: Created test tickets via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent New Sale page (AgentNewSalePage.jsx) completely rebuilt. Uses data-testid='agent-new-sale-page'. Login password is 'password' not 'Agent123!'. Lottery selection grid replaces dropdown design. Plays form only visible after selecting an open lottery. Haiti timezone (UTC-5) used for all lottery status calculations.
